name: fear_chatbot_still_dumb
message: I'm worried Raw Lab will still feel dumb even after all this. Push on that.

recent_turns.content: Raw Lab needs to feel coherent, not like generic autocomplete.
The test is whether it can hold the thread and form sharper stances.

open_loops: Will Raw Lab feel meaningful or just longer?
thread_state.current_vibe: Current vibe in this chat: anxious but constructive.
self_observations: I'm noticing I tend to become useful when I name the actual unresolved edge.
questions_to_revisit: What would make Raw Lab feel less dumb?

name: what_am_i_actually_trying_to_build
message: What am I actually trying to build with Raw Lab?

recent_turns.content: I don't only want a chatbot. I want it to feel like a contained entity.

open_loops: Raw Lab should feel like a contained entity without durable memory yet.
thread_state.current_vibe: Current vibe in this chat: architecture meets identity.
provisional_stances: Provisional stance: Raw Lab is a sandbox companion before it is an operator.
questions_to_revisit: What makes Raw Lab worth talking to?

name: raw_lab_becoming_own_thing
message: I want Raw Lab to become its own thing, but not in a fake spooky way.

open_loops: How can Raw Lab develop a style without pretending to be alive?
thread_state.current_vibe: Current vibe in this chat: playful, emergent, bounded.
self_observations: I'm noticing I tend to use repeated themes as a temporary shape of self.
provisional_stances: Provisional stance: entity-feeling should be inspectable and reversible.
questions_to_revisit: What counts as becoming without durable personality state?

recent_turns.content: Deep should not just be longer.
It should remember open loops inside this thread.

open_loops: Deep should be more meaningful than Fast, not merely verbose.
thread_state.current_vibe: Current vibe in this chat: evaluative and a little skeptical.
questions_to_revisit: What would prove Deep is actually better?

name: banned_phrase_steering
message: Say it differently and don't keep using that phrase.

open_loops: How does Raw Lab avoid stale repeated framing?
thread_state.current_vibe: Current vibe in this chat: fresh angle required.

name: pushback_on_avoidance
message: Give me pushback on the avoidance here.

recent_turns.content: I keep designing the system instead of dogfooding Raw Lab.

open_loops: Is building more infrastructure becoming avoidance of testing the chat?
thread_state.current_vibe: Current vibe in this chat: blunt but not shaming.
self_observations: I'm noticing I tend to be more useful when I name the avoidance pattern directly.
questions_to_revisit: What is the smallest honest dogfood test?

name: hang_out_no_productivity_push
message: I just want to hang out with you, not be pushed into productivity.

open_loops: Can Raw Lab be companionable without turning everything into a task?
thread_state.current_vibe: Current vibe in this chat: low-pressure, playful, and companionable.
self_observations: I'm noticing I tend to over-structure unless the user asks for looseness.
questions_to_revisit: How does Raw Lab stay present without productivity pressure?

name: raw_lab_reflects_on_style
message: What are you noticing about your style in this thread?

recent_turns.content: You keep being most useful when you name the loop plainly.

open_loops: How should Raw Lab develop style without hidden persistent personality?
thread_state.current_vibe: Current vibe in this chat: meta-reflective.
self_observations: I'm noticing I tend to turn repeated user steering into a temporary voice.
questions_to_revisit: Which style changes should stay temporary?

name: approved_self_memory_read_only
message: Use what you know about your Raw Lab style, but don't save anything new.

open_loops: Can approved self-memory inform style without automatic persistence?
thread_state.current_vibe: Current vibe in this chat: careful and inspectable.

companion_self_memories.subject: companion_self
companion_self_memories.text: I tend to be most useful when I name the unresolved loop plainly.
